sourceNote: Full MCC callout drill from FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1. PF initiates reject. PM advises ATC. Evacuation and no-evacuation branches included. Note: prohibited to use reverse when only one engine is operative.

flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts

flow.action: POWER LEVERS — IDLE, REVERSE AS REQUIRED, LAND STRAIGHT AHEAD
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts
FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts

flow.action: IF INSUFFICIENT ROOM TO STOP: PROP LEVERS BOTH FEATHER, FUEL LEVERS BOTH OFF, FUEL SOV SWITCH BOTH OFF, DC MASTER SWITCH OFF
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts

flow.action: TAKING CONTROL — establish nature of malfunction and take appropriate action. If engine fire: complete engine fire on ground memory items
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts

flow.action: IF EVACUATION REQUIRED — ONCE PROPELLERS HAVE STOPPED: EVACUATE, EVACUATE, EVACUATE — LEFT/RIGHT/BOTH SIDES
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts
FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts

flow.action: IF EVACUATION NOT REQUIRED: REMAIN SEATED
flow.reference: FCTM HBTS-001 ISS03 Section 5.3.1; MCC Callouts

flow.action: PASSENGERS ADVISED TO REMAIN SEATED — ATC and company advised of situation
